node.algorithm: Verify preserved evidence, rejudge actual-compute F1 evidence, then require real Gate-0 acceptance and rejudge raw P1v5/P2 causal packets in strict order; expose exactly one active gate without minting a scientific verdict.
node.author: codex-hswm-ordered-gates
node.comment: Fail-closed ordered engineering harness for HSWM F1/B2.2/P1v5/P2/P3/P4; no scientific result or prediction.

questions.body: On a preregistered sealed n>=100 cut, do three typed LLM functions beat equal-call and actual-token-matched flat/vector controls, with role removal and shuffle erasing the advantage?
After F1 and real Gate-0 acceptance, does outcome-bound used-bond eligibility produce a promoted persistent Delta-W that changes later frozen behavior and loses the gain under exact removal?
Can only Agent A's accepted semantic-weight packet improve byte-frozen Agent B on component-disjoint unseen work without transcript, parameter, prompt, or cache leakage?
